ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the observation was made */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Time when the observation was recorded */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed in knots */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction from which the wind is coming */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Current weather conditions */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "air_temperature" INTEGER /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "dew_point" INTEGER /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidex" INTEGER /* Calculated Humidex value */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  "weather_event" TEXT /* Any significant weather event */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username or ID of the meteorologist who updated the observation */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the observation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather observation */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed in knots */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction from which the wind is coming */,
  "gust" INTEGER /* Gust speed in knots */,
  "wind_chill" INTEGER /* Calculated wind chill in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather observation */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "visibility_condition" TEXT /* Description of visibility conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather observation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure adjusted to sea level in kilopascals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather observation */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" INTEGER /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidex" INTEGER /* Calculated Humidex value */,
  "feels_like" INTEGER /* Calculated 'feels like' temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)
